home.heroSearchAria: Search Sullivan County departments, services, and people

emergency.heading: In an emergency
emergency.body: Save these numbers in your phone today.

services.heading: Most-used services
services.description: Pay taxes, apply for permits, register to vote, and more.

departments.heading: Find your department
departments.description: Pick a category to find the right office, phone number, and hours.

promises.heading: Open hours. Open meetings. Honest updates.
promises.p1Body: Every department lists its actual hours and a direct phone line. No phone trees.
promises.p2Body: Every county commission meeting is public and streamed live on YouTube.
promises.p3Body: Site updates published weekly. Use the feedback widget on department and service pages to tell us what's missing.

nextMeeting.heading: Next county commission meeting
nextMeeting.body: Open to the public. Streamed live.

newsSection.heading: Latest updates
newsSection.description: County news, meeting notes, and public notices.

communityMap.heading: The six communities of Sullivan County
communityMap.description: Tap a community to find its services, history, and contact info.
communityMap.svgAria: Map of Sullivan County, Tennessee, showing six communities: Kingsport, Bristol, Blountville, Bluff City, Piney Flats, and Colonial Heights.
communityMap.boundarySource: Boundary data: U.S. Census TIGER/Line. Pins approximate community centers.

audiences.heading: Who are you visiting as today?
audiences.residentsBody: Pay taxes, get a permit, register to vote, find your district commissioner, or check trash pickup days.
audiences.businessesBody: Apply for licenses, find zoning info, look up incentives, or connect with the Industrial Development Board.
audiences.visitorsBody: Heritage trails, parks, lakes, fishing, festivals, and the places where Tennessee began.

about.body: Tennessee's second-oldest county. In 1790, Governor William Blount made Rocky Mount the Southwest Territory's capital — the political seat from which Tennessee was born. Today we cover 430 square miles of the Appalachian Highlands and serve more than 158,000 residents.

news.title: County News
news.description: Stay up to date with the latest announcements, events, and public notices from Sullivan County government.
news.articleNotFoundDesc: The news article you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

forms.title: Online Forms
forms.description: Submit requests, applications, and feedback to Sullivan County government online. All submissions are reviewed by the appropriate department.
forms.submittedDesc: Thank you for your submission. The appropriate department will review it and contact you if additional information is needed.
forms.formNotFoundDesc: The form you're looking for doesn't exist.

lookup.heading: Find your property in 30 seconds
lookup.subheading: Type an address, owner name, or parcel ID. We'll point you to the right official portal — assessment, payment, or map.
lookup.placeholder: Address, owner name, or parcel ID
lookup.noResults: No matches yet. Try just a last name or street name.
lookup.offline: Couldn't reach the state property database. Try again in a minute, or use the buttons below.
lookup.disclosure: Three offices, three portals: the State Comptroller stores assessments, the County Trustee takes payment, and the County GIS shows the map. Each link opens on the official site.

minutes.title: Meeting Minutes
minutes.description: Archive of Sullivan County commission meetings, committee sessions, and public hearings. Download agendas and minutes as PDF documents.
minutes.noResults: No meeting minutes found matching your search.

documents.title: Document Library
documents.description: Access official Sullivan County documents, forms, agendas, and publications.

calendar.title: Calendar & Meetings
calendar.description: Upcoming meetings, public hearings, and events for Sullivan County government.

commissioners.title: County Commissioners
commissioners.description: Sullivan County is governed by a 24-member County Commission representing 11 districts.

footer.copyright: Sullivan County, Tennessee. All rights reserved.

common.errorDesc: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try refreshing the page or return to the homepage.
